resources.title: Building Your First Agent with Veritas-Core
resources.reason: Hands-on practice for code-sandbox learning style
resources.content:
```python
from veritas.core import AgentRuntime

class MyAgent:
    def run(self, task):
        return f"Processing: {task}"

runtime = AgentRuntime()
runtime.register(MyAgent())
```
